channel.title: Tim DeHof's Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on web development, React, and building modern applications.

item.title: The Mysterious Case of the Disappearing Props
item.description: Join us on a humorous detective journey to solve the mystery of disappearing props in a React application. Learn troubleshooting tips and best practices to prevent your props from vanishing into thin air.

item.title: From Mechanical Design Engineer to Fullstack Developer - My Journey and Lessons Learned along the way
item.description: Learn about my journey from mechanical design engineer to fullstack developer

item.title: Github Flavoured Markdown CheatSheet
item.description: A markdown cheat sheet for GFM

item.title: Prop Drilling: The Horror Movie - A Tale of React Components
item.description: Step into a spine-chilling narrative where React components face the dread of prop drilling. Discover how using Context API or Redux can save your components from the depths of despair in this humorous take on a common React challenge.

item.title: How to Deploy the Face Recognition API for Free with Render Alternative to Heroku
item.description: Learn how to deploy the Face Recognition API for free with Render alternative to Heroku

item.title: Debugging React with Wizardry and Magic: A Developer's Spellbook
item.description: Enter the mystical world of debugging React applications with a touch of humor. Learn spells and incantations to banish bugs and optimize your code, all while navigating the enchanting forest of React development.

item.title: React State Management: An Epic Tale of Love, Loss, and Redux
item.description: Embark on a dramatic journey through the realm of React state management. Witness the love triangles, betrayals, and heartaches that components face as they navigate the complex world of state management, with a special appearance by Redux.

item.title: React Hooks: Fishing for Components in the React Sea
item.description: Explore the amusing analogy of React Hooks as fishing tools designed to catch components in the vast sea of React development. Learn how to use useState, useEffect, and useContext to manage your catch effectively.

item.title: The Lifecycle of a React Component, As Told by Cats
item.description: A whimsical exploration of the React component lifecycle, with each stage humorously explained through the behavior of cats. Perfect for developers looking to understand lifecycle methods in a more relatable and entertaining way.

item.title: A Roadmap for Transferring Skills from Mechanical Design Engineering to Fullstack Development
item.description: A guide to help you transfer your skills and achieve success in the field of fullstack development

item.title: How to Summon a React Component: A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Dive into the mystical world of React and learn the incantations needed to summon your very first React component with humor and ease.

item.title: The Power of a Growth Mindset in Software Development - How to Embrace Challenges and Advance Your Career
item.description: A guide to help you develop and maintain a growth mindset in software development

item.title: Unleash the Power of Java - A JavaScript Developer's Guide to Best Practices in Java Development
item.description: Learn how to unleash the power of Java in JavaScript development

item.title: Unraveling the Mystery of an Empty API Response in Axios - A Debugging Adventure
item.description: Learn how to debug an empty API response in Axios
